port.desc: The port the SCPSL server will listen on (UDP)

memory.desc: RAM allocated to the server container (e.g., 2048 for 2GB, 4096 for 4GB)

ip.desc: IP address to bind the server to

max_players.desc: Maximum number of players allowed on the server

exiled.desc: Check this box to install the EXILED plugin framework

exiled_version.desc: The release version of EXILED to install

groups.description: General settings for the SCP: Secret Laboratory server

commands: sh -c 'export SSL_CERT_FILE=/etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt && dpkg --add-architecture i386 && apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl lib32gcc-s1 libstdc++6:i386 libgcc-s1:i386 && if ! id steam > /dev/null 2>&1; then useradd -m -u 1000 -s /bin/bash steam; fi && rm -rf /pufferpanel/Steam /pufferpanel/appcache /pufferpanel/.steam /pufferpanel/steamapps/appmanifest_996560.acf && mkdir -p /tmp/steamcmd && curl -fsSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar -xz -C /tmp/steamcmd && chown -R steam:steam /tmp/steamcmd /pufferpanel && runuser -u steam -- /tmp/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /pufferpanel +login anonymous +app_update 996560 validate +quit && rm -rf /tmp/steamcmd && if [ "${exiled}" = "true" ]; then curl -fsSL -o /tmp/Exiled.tar.gz "https://github.com/ExMod-Team/EXILED/releases/download/${exiled_version}/Exiled.tar.gz" && mkdir -p /tmp/exiled_extract && tar -xzf /tmp/Exiled.tar.gz -C /tmp/exiled_extract && mkdir -p /pufferpanel/.config && if [ -d /tmp/exiled_extract/EXILED ]; then cp -r /tmp/exiled_extract/EXILED /pufferpanel/.config/; fi && if [ -d "/tmp/exiled_extract/SCP Secret Laboratory" ]; then cp -r "/tmp/exiled_extract/SCP Secret Laboratory" /pufferpanel/.config/; fi && rm -rf /tmp/exiled_extract /tmp/Exiled.tar.gz; fi && curl -fsSL https://curl.se/ca/cacert.pem -o /pufferpanel/ca-certificates.crt && mkdir -p /pufferpanel/.config && chmod -R 777 /pufferpanel && chmod +x /pufferpanel/LocalAdmin && chmod +x /pufferpanel/SCPSL.x86_64'
